markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the "Question Center" content strategy to unblock production.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Production Unblocked:** The Question Center content strategy is approved, allowing production to start at a cadence of 10 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [**Improved Data Sourcing:** A new agentic pipeline will use primary sources (.gov, .edu) and cite them academically in-text to build authority and trust.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
  - [**New Methodology Blurb:** A final source list will be replaced by a methodology blurb explaining the sourcing process, which aligns with Google's focus on transparency.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [**Website Launch Timeline:** The web team estimates a 1–2 week build time for the Question Center, with the goal of launching it in the next sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Inaccurate & Unauthoritative Content

  - [The previous content pipeline scraped Homebase's existing content, which created two key issues:](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
      - [**Outdated Data:** Facts and figures were pulled from old articles, leading to inaccuracies.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
      - [**Missing Context:** The original sourcing for statistics was lost, undermining the content's authority.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)

### Solution: New Sourcing & Content Strategy

  - [**New Agentic Pipeline:** A new pipeline will conduct more thorough research, prioritizing primary sources like government and academic sites.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
  - [**Academic In-Text Citations:** Data points will be cited academically (e.g., "According to \[Source\]") to build authority for this specific content format.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [**Methodology Blurb:** The final source list will be replaced with a blurb explaining the sourcing process.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Aligns with Google's focus on transparency and methodology.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [**Improved CTAs:** Calls to action are now more relevant to the article's topic (e.g., a "payroll" CTA on a payroll article).](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [**Tone & Transitions:**](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
      - [**Tone:** The new tone is more authoritative but still matches the Homebase brand.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
      - [**Transitions:** The pipeline will be updated to add transition sentences between paragraphs and bulleted lists for better flow.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)

### Implementation & Cadence

  - [**Production Cadence:** 10 articles per week.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [**Initial Review Process:** The first few batches will include internal comments explaining the sources used to simplify the Homebase team's review.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [**Homebase Review Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Sonia:** Will conduct a final pass on the first batch for tone and flow.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
      - [**Kerry:** Will set up the Question Center on the website once the first drafts are ready.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [**Both:** Should look for any missed queries or topics that could be added to articles.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)

### Related Topic: Content Refresh

  - [**Finding:** An analysis of TLDRs revealed inconsistencies in existing content, such as mismatched numbers in listicles and incorrect dates.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [**Action:** These findings will be included in Jacob's "Refresh Priorities" analysis, which will be shared next week.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [Send the first batch of 10 Question Center articles tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [Update the pipeline to add transition sentences.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
      - [Implement the methodology blurb at the end of each article.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [**Sonia:**](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
      - [Review the first batch of articles tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [**Kerry:**](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [Set up the Question Center on the website once drafts are ready (est. 1–2 weeks).](https://fathom.video/share/EBWTgP64x5AZ1gkiVvxF1BF7THWxSJom?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
